title: Path of the Archer
description:
Level 2 option

Jeanne chooses the path of the Archer, equipping a bow to engage foes from afar.
Gains the Divine Arrow ability, which deals high damage to a single target.

Requires 500XP

title: Path of the Warrior
description:
Level 2 option

Jeanne chooses the path of the Warrior, equipping a two handed sword to engage foes in close combat.
Gains the Holy Wrath ability, which deals area of effect damage around Jeanne.

Requires 500XP

title: Champion Companions
description:
Level 3 option

Jeanne's Champions become available to train at Barracks.
Gains "To Arms, Men!", which rallies 3 Champions to her side.

Requires 500XP

title: Rider Companions
description:
Level 3 option

Jeanne's Riders become available to train at Stables.
Gains "Riders, Ready!", which rallies 3 Riders to her side.

Requires 500XP

title: Field Commander
description:
Level 4 option

Jeanne's Rally Call ability will now call 7 of her chosen companions onto the Battlefield.
Gains the Strength of Heaven ultimate ability, which greatly empowers a single unit.

Requires 500XP

title: Gunpowder Monarch
description:
Level 4 option

Jeanne's Rally Call ability will now call 3 of her chosen companions and a powerful Cannon onto the Battlefield.
Gains the Valorous Inspiration ultimate ability, which greatly increases the attack speed of nearby allies.

Requires 500XP

title: Divine Restoration
description:
Jeanne and nearby allies are blessed, instantly healing for 30% of their missing health.
Cooldown: 120 Seconds.

title: Divine Arrow
description:
Jeanne targets an enemy and fires a divine projectile that deals 40 damage at level 2, 100 damage at level 3, and 150 damage at level 4.
Cooldown: 8 Seconds.
Recharge Time: 60 Seconds.
Max Charges: 4

title: Consecrate
description:
Jeanne consecrates a production building, reducing the Food cost of units by -25%.
No Cooldown
Recharge Time: 120 Seconds.
Max Charges: 4.

title: Holy Wrath
description:
Jeanne unleashes a powerful area of effect attack, striking all enemies within 1.25 tiles for 20 damage at level 2, 30 at level 3, and 50 at level 4.
Cooldown: 8 Seconds.
Recharge Time: 60 Seconds.
Max Charges: 4.

title: To Arms, Men!
description:
Jeanne calls 3 Champions to her side.
Cooldown: 240 Seconds.

title: Riders, Ready!
description:
Jeanne calls 3 Riders to her side.
Cooldown: 240 Seconds.

title: Strength of Heaven
description:
Jeanne chooses a unit to bless, bestowing them with incredible strength and durability. The chosen warrior gains 300 health, 4 Melee and Ranged Armor, and +300% damage.
Jeanne may only bless one unit at a time.
Cooldown: 30 Seconds.

title: Valorous Inspiration
description:
Increases the attack speed of all units within 4 tiles by 35% for 20 seconds.
Cooldown: 60 Seconds.

title: Supervise
description: Supervise a research, production, or drop-off building with an Imperial Official to make it work 150% faster. Resource drop-off buildings receive 20% more resources. Cannot be used on Landmarks, Town Centers, or Docks.

title: Kharash Edict
description:
Activate to allow the Golden Tent and Military Buildings within the influence of a Fortified Outpost to produce an additional Kharash whenever any unit is recruited.
Only one edict can be active.

title: Stockyard Edict
description:
Activate to allow Stockyards within the influence of a Fortified Outpost to generate Gold while being worked.
Only one edict can be active.

title: Camel Unease
description: Camels cause enemy horse cavalry units to deal 20% less damage.

title: Conversion
description:
Attempts to convert enemy units within range of this Monk to your control.
Cooldown: 120 Seconds.

title: Detonate
description: Detonate the ship.

title: Man The Sails
description: Activate to move 40% faster for 10 seconds, deactivates early when dealing damage.

title: Proselytize
description: Attempts to convert a single enemy unit within range of this Imam to your control.

title: Quick Strike
description: Quickly deals a second hit after finishing an attack.

title: Ring the Town Bell
description: Alerts and orders all nearby Villagers to automatically seek shelter in the nearest garrisonable building.

title: Atabeg Supervision
description: Garrison inside of a military production building to grant +20% health to newly trained units. Cannot garrison in Docks.

title: Desert Raider Blade
description: Swap to a melee Sword weapon.

title: Desert Raider Bow
description: Swap to a ranged Bow weapon.

title: Mass Heal
description: Heals all nearby units. Heals +50% times faster when carrying a relic.

title: Structural Reinforcements
description:
Siege unit gains +20 melee armor and +5 fire armor for 10 seconds.
Only useable on one unit at a time.

title: Swap Weapon (Incendiary)
description: Switch to incendiary ammunition, which deals damage in an increased area.

title: Swap Weapon (Kinetic)
description: Switch to solid ammunition, which deals higher damage.

title: Tactical Charge
description: Camel Lancers charge faster, more often, and for longer distances than other heavy cavalry. Camel Lancers deals -25% less baseline charge damage. Each second spent charging increases the charge damage (up to +40%).

title: Akritoi Defense
description:
Arm nearby Villagers with stronger weapons and increase their armor by +2 for 30 seconds.
+1 damage in Dark Age
+1 damage in Feudal Age
+1 damage in Castle Age
+2 damage in Imperial Age

title: Artillery Shot
description:
Loads this Cannon with an Artillery Shot that has an increased range of 5 tiles and 30% more damage.
Can only target buildings.

title: Automatic Pilgrim Flask
description: Toggle on to activate automatic drinking when low health, rapidly increasing health regeneration by 25 per second for 6 seconds.

title: Berserking
description: Varangian Guard swap to their two-handed weapon and deal +6 damage for 30 seconds. Armor is reduced by -4.

title: Border Settlement
description: Line of sight increased by 7 tiles.

title: Conscriptio
description: Military unit production rate increased +20%/+40%/+60%/+80%/+100% by Water Level while within the influence of a Cistern.

title: Dialecticus
description: Research rate increased +30%/+60%/+90%/+120%/+150% by Water Level while within the influence of a Cistern.

title: Emperor's Guard
description: Armor increased by +3 while near allied Wonders.

title: Field Stones
description: Earn various amounts of Stone from every building constructed.

title: Improved Torch
description: Torch damage improved by a nearby Scout.

title: Irrigated
description: Villager gathering rate increased by 5/10/15/20/25% (depening on water level)

title: Naval Deployment
description: Increased movement speed after unloading from a Transport Ship.

title: Oil Commerce
description: Traders provide +20% Olive Oil on trades.

title: Olive Harvest
description: Villagers generate Olive Oil equal to 20% of Food gathered when farming.

title: Pilgrim Flask
description: Activate to drink, rapidly increasing health regeneration by 25 per second for 6 seconds.

title: Place Palings
description: Enemy cavalry are stunned for 2.5 seconds and take 19 damage.

title: Praesidium
description: Building damage taken decreased by -5%/-10%/-15%/-20%/-25% by Water Level while within the influence of a Cistern.

title: Shield Wall
description: Enter a defensive stance, decreasing move speed by -25%, attack speed by -25%, and ranged damage taken by -30%.

title: Synergistic Crops
description: Farmers and Foragers generate +60% Olive Oil around the Grand Winery.

title: Trample
description: Charge through enemy units in your path, dealing 12 damage to each one.

title: Triumph
description:
Consume all Supply Points to increase cavalry damage by +4, move speed by +10%, and health regeneration by +2. 
Each Supply Point increases Triumph's duration by 1 seconds. A maximum of 45 Supply Points can be collected.

title: Varangian Berserking
description: Damage increased by +6 and armor decreased by -4.

title: Imperial Spies
description: Reveal location of enemy workers for 15 seconds.

title: Spirit Way Ancestors
description: When a dynasty unit is killed, nearby units receive +20% attack speed and +20 health over 10 seconds.

title: The Long Wall
description: All units standing on Walls gain +25% ranged damage.

title: Tower of Victory Aura
description: Melee and ranged infantry who move near this Landmark permanently gain +20% attack speed.

title: Abbey Healing
description: Heals nearby out of combat units by 6 every 1 seconds.

title: Network of Castles
description: When enemies are nearby, this building sounds an alarm, causing nearby units to get a +20% increase to attack speed.

title: Deploy Pavise
description:
Activate to increase weapon range by +1 tile and gain +5 ranged armor.
Remains active for 30 seconds or until the Arbalétrier moves away.

title: Call Rus Tributes
description:
Dispatch 4 Rus Tributes from the Golden Tent and increase the cost of the Call Rus Tributes by +300 Stone.
The cost of Call Rus Tributes will be reduced by 10 Stone every 30 seconds. Each Military Building will reduce the cost by an additional 5 Stone up to a maximum of 70 Stone. Will automatically deploy the Rus Tributes when the cost reaches zero.

title: Defensive Aura Edict
description: Units near an Outpost gain +10% health.

title: Production Speed Edict
description:
Activate to increase the production speed of the Golden Tent and Military Buildings within the influence of a Fortified Outpost by +15%.
Only one edict can be active.

title: Emergency Repairs
description: Building repairs itself by 150 health every 1 second for 20 seconds.

title: Deflective Armor
description: Deflective Armor charge can block one melee or ranged attack. Recharges while out of combat for 15 seconds.

title: Kabura-ya
description: Onna-Musha fire a whistling arrow when an enemy is seen, increasing move speed for 10 seconds.

title: Katana Bannerman Aura
description:
Aura that increases melee infantry damage by +15%.
Banner drops on death and lasts for 30 seconds providing the same aura.

title: Place Yorishiro
description:
Place a Yorishiro in the following buildings to receive bonuses and increase their line of sight.
Military and Docks: +125% Production speed
Town Center: +30% Production speed
Farmhouse: +70 Food per minute
Lumber Camp: +70 Wood per minute
Forge: +50 Gold per minute
Wonder: +4000 Health

title: Sabotage
description: Target a visible enemy building to deal 200 damage, disable its production, and set it on fire for 30 seconds.

title: Shunshin
description: Drop a smoke bomb and reappear at a selected location.

title: Sohei's Sutra
description: Reduces enemy damage by 50% for 60 seconds.

title: Spy
description: Target a visible enemy unit or structure to disguise the Shinobi as a Villager of that player.

title: Treasure Caravans
description: Select a neutral Trade Post to periodically spawn Treasure Caravans from that location. Caravans can convert into a Trade Ship when instructed to reach Trade Posts over water.

title: Uma Bannerman Aura
description:
Aura that increases cavalry unit damage by +10%.
Banner drops on death and lasts for 30 seconds providing the same aura.

title: Yumi Bannerman Aura
description:
Aura that increases ranged infantry damage by +15%.
Banner drops on death and lasts for 30 seconds providing the same aura.

title: Bring down the walls!
description: Jeanne calls a Cannon to her side. Rallies an additional Cannon if used on a Neutral Settlement.

title: Construct the Kingdom
description: Nearby Villagers construct buildings 33% faster.

title: Forward, companions!
description: Jeanne calls 3/6 Knights to her side. Rallies 2 additional Knights if used on a Neutral Settlement.

title: Galvanize the Righteous
description: Companions close to Jeanne gain +1/1 armor and +10% damage.

title: Honorable Heart
description:
Jeanne regenerates 1/1.5/2/2.5 health per second while out of combat based on her current level.
At level 3 Jeanne takes 45% less damage from ranged attacks; at level 4 this is increased to 60%.

title: Jeanne's Companions
description: Achieve level 3 with Jeanne d'Arc to select between Champions and Riders to be trained at the keep.

title: Journey of a Hero
description:
Jeanne generates experience for completing tasks such as gathering resources, constructing buildings, hunting boar, capturing Sacred Sites, and participating in combat. Jeanne also gains a small trickle of experience over time.
After earning sufficient experience Jeanne can level up, becoming more powerful and gaining access to unique abilities.

title: Nock your arrows!
description: Jeanne calls 2/4/6 Archers to her side. Rallies 2 additional Archers if used on a Neutral Settlement.

title: Return of the Saint
description: Pay tribute and instantly return Jeanne to the battlefield.

title: Spears up!
description: Jeanne calls 2 Spearmen to her side. Awards 50 experience if activated on a Neutral Settlement or a friendly Keep or Landmark.

title: Talented Builder
description:
Jeanne constructs buildings 33% faster.
Upon reaching level 2, Jeanne shares her talents with nearby builders.

title: Flower Garden
description:
Plant a Flower Garden that increases nearby villager gather rate by +25% and non-siege military attack speed by +25%.
The Flower Garden will persist until a new Flower Garden is planted.

title: Karma
description: Villagers gathering resources in radius of this religious structure generate Karma.

title: Siege Repairs
description: Repairs nearby siege engines for 2 health every second.

title: Spiritual Awakening
description:
Attempts to convert enemy units to your control in cascading rings around this landmark. Garrisoning monks will add additional rings, up to 3.
Cooldown: 7 minutes.

title: Pilgrim Destination
description: Select a Sacred Site for your Pilgrims to travel to. Pilgrims cannot travel to a Sacred Site captured by an enemy.

title: Pilgrim Loan (Large)
description: Provide a loan to Pilgrims that will be repaid at a rate of 900 gold per minute for 4 minutes

title: Pilgrim Loan (Medium)
description: Provide a loan to Pilgrims that will be repaid at a rate of 600 gold per minute for 3 minutes

title: Pilgrim Loan (Small)
description: Provide a loan to Pilgrims that will be repaid at a rate of 300 gold per minute for 2 minutes

title: Atgeirmaðr Production
description: Toggle on to reinforce with Atgeirmaðr

title: Attack Ship Production
description: Toggle on to reinforce with Attack Ships

title: Bogmaðr Production
description: Toggle on to reinforce with Bogmaðr

title: Cistern's Favor
description:
Ability can be used on military production or technology buildings to increase their work rate by +150%. If used on Mining Camps, Lumber Camps, or Farms, begin generating 160 Gold, Wood, or Food over 60 seconds.
Recharges every 90 seconds.

title: Galley Production
description: Toggle on to reinforce with Galleys

title: Riddari Production
description: Toggle on to reinforce with Riddari

title: Varangian Guard Production
description: Toggle on to reinforce with Varangian Guards

title: Varangian Reinforcements
description: Reinforcing with Varangians, Galleys, or Attack Ships after enough units fall in battle.

title: Activate Stealth
description:
Enter Stealth for 30 seconds.
While in Stealth, units are invisible until they are revealed by enemy Scouts, Outposts, Landmark Town Centers, or they engage in combat.

title: Coastal Navigation
description: Ships near a Docks get +15% speed for 25 seconds.

title: First Strike
description: Musofadi Warriors and Musofadi Gunners deal double damage on their first attack when breaking stealth.

title: Food Festival
description: Increase villager gather rate and move speed by +50%

title: Huntress' Stealth
description: Malian infantry within range enter Stealth. While in Stealth, units are invisible until they are revealed by enemy Scouts, Outposts, or when they engage in combat.

title: Military Festival
description: Increase all unit production speed by +100% for 90 seconds.

title: Siege Festival
description:
Increase damage of Battering Rams, Bombards, Counterweight Trebuchets, and torches by +50% for 90 seconds.
Applies to Springald Ships once Mounted Guns has been researched.

title: Attack Speed Arrow
description: Fires a Signal Arrow that increases the attack speed of nearby ranged units (including the Khan) by +50% for 5 seconds.

title: Keshik Healing
description: Heals after every attack performed.

title: Defense Arrow
description: Fires a Signal Arrow that increases the armor of nearby units (including the Khan) by +2 for 5 seconds.

title: Kurultai Aura
description: Nearby units within its aura heal +1 health every 1 second and gain an additional +20% damage.

title: Maneuver Arrow
description: Fire a Signal Arrow that increases the movement speed of nearby units (including the Khan) by +33% for 5 seconds. Does not affect Villagers.

title: Yam
description: Cavalry and Traders near an Outpost get +15% speed for 10 seconds.

title: Yam Network (Improved)
description: Yam speed aura applies to all units instead of just Traders and cavalry units. Does not apply to siege engines.

title: Attack Drums
description: Mehter drums that increase the attack speed of nearby units by +15%.

title: Fortitude
description: Gain +40% attack speed and receive +50% damage from melee weapons for 10 seconds.

title: Mehter Speed Bonus
description: Units move +15% faster when in formation.

title: Melee Defense Drums
description: Mehter drums that increase the melee armor of nearby units by +2.

title: Ranged Defense Drums
description: Mehter drums that increase the ranged armor of nearby units by +1.

title: Trade Protection
description: Traders and Trade Ships near Keeps receive +30% move speed and +8 armor for 20 seconds.

title: Gallop
description: Activate to move at maximum speed with +2 tile weapon range for 8 seconds.

title: High Armory Production Bonus
description: The cost of siege engines in nearby Siege Workshops is decreased by 20%.

title: Saint's Blessing
description: After striking an enemy, the Warrior Monk increases the armor and damage of nearby allied Rus military units for a duration.

title: Static Deployment
description: Streltsy gain +30% attack speed after remaining stationary for 10 seconds.

title: Brewery Delivery
description: When 350 Gold is collected from the Toko-Koji Mats, a Sake delivery is sent to a nearby Matsuri.

title: Castle of the Crow Aura
description: Siege units near the Castle gain +10% damage and +1 tiles range.

title: Matsuri Aura
description: Currently no bonus gather rate. Each Yatai trader that arrives to this Matsuri will increase the bonus gather rate provided to nearby Villagers by +5%.

title: Redirect Yatai
description: While active the Home Matsuri of all Yatai is set to this building.

title: Ryokan Healing
description: Nearby units gain a permanent healing buff. The healing buff will heal the unit when out of combat by 4 health every 5 seconds.

title: Shinobi Ambush
description:
Target near Stealth Forest or one of your buildings to summon a group Shinobi with Torinoko Grenades that increase damage taken by 40% and slow enemies by 25% for 3 seconds.
The Shinobi will escape after 45 seconds or if they used their 3 grenades.

title: Shinobi Scout
description: Reveals a 10 tile radius for 20 seconds.

title: Elephant Economics
description: Assistance from Worker Elephants increases resources dropped off by 5%.

title: Tughlaqabad Fort Overwatch
description: Increasing the production speed of nearby Docks by 30%, arrowslits damage by 2, and weapon range by 1 tile.

title: Ascetic Recovery
description: The Shaolin Monk regains health when out of combat.

title: Body of Iron
description: The Shaolin Monk hardens his body and reduces incoming ranged damage by 50% for 15 seconds.

title: Bounty of Solitude
description:
Increases the resource value of nearby gold veins, stone outcroppings, and berry bushes by +5% every 30 seconds up to a maximum of +60%.
Trees are increased at a lesser rate of +2.5% up to +30%.
After 330 seconds, generates resources equal to 5% of the current resources in those nearby deposits. Additionally generates 5% of the maximum resources of each deposit when fully gathered.

title: City Guard
description: Spawns an army of 4 Zhuge Nu and 3 Palace Guards.

title: Divine Charge
description: Cavalry units deal +20% damage.

title: Divine Defense
description: Gunpowder units and defensive structures gain +1 range.

title: Divine Haste
description: Infantry units move 15% faster.

title: Divine Vitality
description: Units out of combat heal 2 health per second.

title: Imperial Retinue
description: Spawns an army of 4 Yuan Raiders and 1 Imperial Guard.

title: Provincial Levy
description: Spawns an army of 4 Spearman and 3 Horsemen.

title: Ranged Specialists
description: Spawns an army of 4 Crossbowmen and 1 Grenadier.
